subject: [SO] Recursive Service Orchestration - Configmap changes
commit_message:
[SO] Recursive Service Orchestration - Configmap changes

Added Adapter settings to allow the so-bpmn-infra to execute
itself recursively

Issue-ID: OOM-2996

Signed-off-by: Andreas Geissler <andreas-geissler@telekom.de>
Change-Id: Idc55a771311cf5c38fa3dde3013f9b97e93fd858
